claims.text: The loop scheduler reduces idle tool time from 42 minutes to 18 minutes on 12 Auto Research tasks.
The benchmark reports the planner-only baseline and the scheduler result in Table 1.
The study leaves model-tier cost ablations for future work.

review_layers.text: The paper does not report the planner-only baseline, so the scheduler gain is unsupported.
evidence: Paper explicitly reports the planner-only baseline.
review_layers.next_action: Do not spend the next loop on this criticism.

review_layers.text: The paper never runs model-tier cost ablations, so the chosen workflow may be uneconomical.
evidence: Paper lists model-tier cost ablations as future work.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Cost can change the preferred workflow even if quality holds.

review_layers.text: The system should ship a mobile notification app for annotators.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
